info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description: This Web service returns a list of electronic collections.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words in interface_name, keywords, name or po_line_id (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_collections.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_collections.xsd)

post.description: This Web service creates an electronic collection.

requestBody.description: This method takes an ElectronicCollection object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_collection.xsd?tags=POST)

400.description:
Bad Request

60126 - 'The name is missing.'

402469 - 'The library code is not valid.'

60127 - 'The type is missing or not valid.'

60128 - 'The access type is missing or not valid.'

60129 - 'The license is not valid.'

60158 - 'The process type is not valid.'

60130 - 'The free indicator is not valid.'

60131 - 'The language is not valid.'

60132 - 'The proxy enable is not valid.'

60133 - 'The proxy is not valid.'

60134 - 'The interface is not valid.'

60135 - 'The group proxy is not valid.'

60137 - 'The PO line is not valid.'

60139 - 'The collection ID was not created.'

60140 - 'The community zone record was not created.'

60141 - 'The collection could not be saved.'

60142 - 'The collection date is not valid.'

60143 - 'The resource metadata mms id is not valid.'

60151 - 'The collection was not found.'

60152 - 'The group is not valid.'

60296 - 'The COUNTER platform is not valid.'

60353 - 'The linking parameter is not valid. '

60354 - 'The group linking parameter is not valid. '

60359 - 'This collection does not support linking parameters'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_collection.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_collection.xsd)

delete.description:
This Web service deletes an electronic collection. 



Note that it is possible to delete an electronic collection only if there are no services related to it. 



Delete the related services before deleting the electronic collection.  See Delete Electronic Service API.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The Collection ID was not found.'

60154 - 'The collection could not be deleted.'

60155 - 'Error during collection delete.'

60156 - 'Error during collection delete with associated Bib.'

60289 - 'The delete is blocked e-service attached.'

get.description: This Web service returns an electronic collection given an electronic collection ID.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The collection ID is not valid.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_collection.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_collection.xsd)

get.description: This Web service returns a list of electronic services for a given electronic collection ID.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The Collection ID was not found.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_services.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_services.xsd)

post.description: This Web service creates an electronic service.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

requestBody.description: This method takes an ElectronicService object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_service.xsd?tags=POST)

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The Collection ID is not valid.'

60127 - 'The type is missing or not valid.'

60130 - 'The free indicator is not valid.'

60132 - 'The proxy enable is not valid.'

60133 - 'The proxy is not valid.'

60135 - 'The group proxy is not valid.'

60138 - 'The activation status is not valid.'

60139 - 'The service ID was not created.'

60141 - 'The service could not be saved.'

60142 - 'The service date is not valid.'

60144 - 'The unavailable flag is not valid.'

60145 - 'The link resolver is not valid.'

60146 - 'The URL type is not valid.'

60147 - 'The cross ref data is not valid.'

60148 - 'The linking level is not valid.'

60149 - 'The service was not created.'

60152 - 'The group is not valid.'

60353 - 'The linking parameter is not valid. '

60354 - 'The group linking parameter is not valid. '

60355 - 'HAN proxy license fields are mandatory '

60356 - 'The HAN license public name is not valid. '

60357 - 'Enable HAN multi license proxy'

60358 - 'The HAN license public name is not unique'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_service.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_service.xsd)

delete.description:
This Web service deletes an electronic service. 



Note that it is possible to delete an electronic service only if there are no portfolios related to it. 



Delete the related portfolios before deleting the electronic collection.  See [related blog](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/delete-portfolios-before-deleting-the-electronic-service/) on this subject.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The Collection ID was not found.'

60122 - 'The Service ID was not found.'

60154 - 'The service could not be deleted.'

60157 - 'The delete is in process.'

60289 - 'The delete is blocked portfolio attached.'

get.description: This Web service returns service details for a given service ID.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'The Collection ID was not found.'

60122 - 'The Service ID was not found.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_electronic_service.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_electronic_service.xsd)

get.description: This Web service returns a list of portfolios for a given electronic collection ID and electronic service ID.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'Failed to find the Collection ID.'

60122 - 'Failed to find the Service ID.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_portfolios.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolios.xsd)

post.description: This Web service creates an electronic portfolio.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

requestBody.description: This method takes a portfolio object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolio.xsd?tags=POST)

400.description:
Bad Request

60121 - 'Failed to find the Collection ID.'

60122 - 'Failed to find the Service ID.'

60159 - 'The MMS ID is required.'

60161 - 'The portfolio availability code is not valid.'

60162 - 'Problem retrieving the collection or service information.'

60163 - 'Failed to create the TPS metadata.'

60164 - 'Failed to create the Portfolio metadata.'

60165 - 'A metadata operation has failed.'

60166 - 'The URL type is not valid.'

60167 - 'The proxy enable flag is not valid.'

60168 - 'The proxy code is not valid.'

60169 - 'The license is not valid.'

60170 - 'The coverage in use is not valid.'

60171 - 'The material type is not valid.'

60172 - 'The title MMS ID is not valid.'

60172 - 'The PO line reference is not valid.'

402469 - 'The library code is not valid.'

60296 - 'The COUNTER platform is not valid.'

300465 - 'The portfolio availability date range is invalid'

200797 - 'Unable to change portfolio availability status due to date range'

60360 - 'The provenance code is not valid.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_portfolio.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolio.xsd)

delete.description: This Web service deletes an electronic portfolio.See [related blog](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/delete-portfolios-before-deleting-the-electronic-service/) on this subject.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

parameters.name: portfolio_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the portfolio.

parameters.name: bib
parameters.description: Method for handling a bib left without any inventory: retain, suppress or delete. Optional. By default: retain.

400.description:
Bad Request

60122 - 'The Portfolio ID was not found.'

60175 - 'The portfolio could not be deleted.'

60174 - 'The delete is in process.'

get.description: This Web service returns a portfolio for a given electronic collection ID, electronic service ID and electronic portfolio ID.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

parameters.name: portfolio_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the portfolio.

400.description:
Bad Request

60123 - 'Failed to find the Portfolio ID.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_portfolio.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolio.xsd)

put.description: This Web service updates an electronic portfolio.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic collection.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the electronic service.

parameters.name: portfolio_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the portfolio.

requestBody.description: This method takes a portfolio object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolio.xsd?tags=PUT)

400.description:
Bad Request

60123 - 'Failed to find the Portfolio ID.'

60161 - 'The portfolio availability code is not valid.'

60165 - 'A metadata operation has failed.'

60166 - 'The URL type is not valid.'

60167 - 'The proxy enable flag is not valid.'

60168 - 'The proxy code is not valid.'

60169 - 'The license is not valid.'

60170 - 'The coverage in use is not valid.'

60171 - 'The material type is not valid.'

60172 - 'The PO line reference is not valid.'

402469 - 'The library code is not valid.'

60296 - 'The COUNTER platform is not valid.'

300465 - 'The portfolio availability date range is invalid'

200797 - 'Unable to change portfolio availability status due to date range'

60360 - 'The provenance code is not valid.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_portfolio.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_portfolio.xsd)

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key used to authorize requests. Learn about how to create API keys at [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#defining)
ApiKeyAuth.name: apikey

remaining.description: The number of remaining calls according to the [Governance Threshold](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#threshold)
